failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Regular maintenance and inspection of BPR valve
Monitor temperature closely and install emergency cooling system

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.33342 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Perform thermal stability test at 130°C to ensure no exothermic side reactions
Conduct BPR valve stress test to simulate blockage and assess system response
